title: Migration Adobe-equivalent map
description: 3rd-party Magento module -> Adobe-native equivalent map consumed by the AIRA migrate profiler (3rd-party -> REPLACE). The IDE compiles each pattern+flags into a case-insensitive RegExp matched against '<module> <composer.name> <require>'. Self-signed via _integrity (sha256 + ed25519), exactly like stack.json / capabilities.json.

pattern.description: A JS RegExp source matched against the module id + composer require.

equivalent.description: The Adobe-native replacement surfaced to the user.
